question: In the scene where the tongs are lifted towards the camera lens, which numbers are visible on the wooden ruler? A. 1, 2, 3 B. 5, 6, 7 C. 8, 9, 10 D. 10, 11, 12
What is the highest inch marking visible on the ruler when measuring the length of the tongs?
What is the primary material of the tongs held by the hand in the video? A. Plastic B. Wood C. Metal D. Silicone
What entities are present on the countertop and how are they being manipulated?
canonical_answer: A collection of kitchen utensils rests on a beige tiled countertop with dark grout lines. Various pairs of metal tongs with black silicone tips or plastic handles are arranged alongside black chopsticks and a slotted spatula. A hand wearing a light-colored sleeve picks up different tongs, squeezing the handles to open the scalloped gripping ends. Wooden salt and pepper shakers sit in the background near a wooden ruler.

question: How many numbers are visible on the wooden ruler?

Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. person in light beige long-sleeved shirt B. person with bare forearm holding silver tongs C. person in light grey long-sleeved shirt D. person with bare forearm holding black handled tongs

Describe the sequence of actions performed with the kitchen tongs from the moment they are selected until the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a hand grasps the central pair of metal tongs; at 9s, the hand lifts the tongs off the white tiled surface; at 12s, the hand squeezes the handles causing the gripping ends to open wide; at 16s, the hand rotates black metal tongs to display serrated tips; at 18s, the hand tilts tongs with black silicone tips upwards.

They are lifted and squeezed open by a hand. C. They are hung vertically in front of a beige wall. D. They are rotated to display black silicone tips.
What does the person do with the wooden ruler lying on the counter?
canonical_answer: The person holds the ruler vertically against the tongs to measure their length.
